generated_oml:
// Physical Sensing Components
instance InsideTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital temperature sensor located inside the incubator (sensor 1)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideTempDataTransmitted1
]

instance InsideTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital temperature sensor located inside the incubator (sensor 2)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData InsideTempDataTransmitted2
]

instance AmbientTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 digital temperature sensor located outside the incubator measuring ambient temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]

// Physical Acting Components
instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electrical heating plate (heatbed) controlled by the Raspberry Pi."
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan controlled by the Raspberry Pi to dissipate heat."
]

// Data Transmission Instances
instance InsideTempDataTransmitted1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Temperature data from InsideTempSensor1 transmitted via RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideTempSensor1
]

instance InsideTempDataTransmitted2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Temperature data from InsideTempSensor2 transmitted via RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InsideTempSensor2
]

instance AmbientTempDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTempSensor
]

instance ActuatorStateTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Actuator state data (heatbed and fan) transmitted via RabbitMQ."
]

instance PredictedTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature output from ThermalModelA transmitted via RabbitMQ."
]

instance CalibratedParameterDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters from ParameterCalibrationService transmitted via RabbitMQ."
]

// Data Instances
instance InsideTempSampleData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature sample collected from InsideTempSensor1."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
    DTDFVocab:fromData InsideTempDataTransmitted1
]

instance InsideTempSampleData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature sample collected from InsideTempSensor2."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
    DTDFVocab:fromData InsideTempDataTransmitted2
]

instance AmbientTempSampleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature sample collected from AmbientTempSensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTempDataTransmitted
]

instance ActuatorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current state of heatbed and fan actuators."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
    DTDFVocab:fromData ActuatorStateTransmitted
]

instance PredictedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature trajectory from ThermalModelA."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
    DTDFVocab:fromData PredictedTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CalibratedParameterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal parameters obtained from ParameterCalibrationService."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
    DTDFVocab:fromData CalibratedParameterDataTransmitted
]

// Enablers
instance RaspberryPiDevice : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B acting as controller, data aggregator, and enabler for virtual services."
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureMonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService,
        ParameterCalibrationService, BangBangControlService,
        VisualizationService, RemoteActuationService
]

instance RabbitMQServer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ AMQP server used by the DT to receive sensor data and publish model outputs."
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureMonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService,
        ParameterCalibrationService, BangBangControlService,
        VisualizationService, RemoteActuationService
]

// Models
instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermodynamic model A with 2 free parameters calibrated via least-squares optimisation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermodynamic model B with 4 free parameters calibrated via least-squares optimisation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiDevice
]

// Services
instance TemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring service providing live temperature streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperatureInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation service evaluating thermal dynamics using Models A & B."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalDynamicsPredictionInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration service optimizing model parameters via least-squares."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedThermalInertiaInsight, ControlScheduleInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides SuggestParameterUpdateAction
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Closed-loop bang‑bang control of the heatbed and fan."
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction, SuggestSchedulingChangeAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization service for virtual representation of the DT."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeDataAction
]

instance RemoteActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote actuation service enabling direct control of the PT."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteActuationAction
]

// Insights
instance RealTimeTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live temperature readings from the PT."
]

instance ThermalDynamicsPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal dynamics of the incubator using the selected model."
]

instance CalibratedThermalInertiaInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal inertia parameters after optimisation."
]

instance SteadyStateTemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictions of steady‑state temperatures."
]

instance ControlScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended control schedules based on long‑term data analysis."
]

// Actions
instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang‑bang control action toggles heatbed and fan to maintain desired temperature."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SuggestParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic suggestion to update model parameters based on new data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SuggestSchedulingChangeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic suggestion to modify control schedule based on analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizeDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic visualization of temperature data and model predictions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to remotely actuate the PT via the Raspberry Pi."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT issues control commands (heatbed on/off, fan on/off) via RabbitMQ messages that the Raspberry Pi controller processes and forwards to the MOSFET‑controlled actuators. These commands constitute the virtual‑to‑physical flow."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with periodic sensor polling (few seconds) and command updates through RabbitMQ. Calibration and long‑term data analysis are performed offline on recorded data samples."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT is orchestrated by the RabbitMQ message broker linking the physical components (sensors/actuators) to the DT services (control, modeling, monitoring). The theatrical flow runs from PT → low‑level driver → RabbitMQ → DT algorithms → RabbitMQ → controller → PT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin covers the PT during manufacturing (setup of hardware and initial software) and operation (runtime monitoring and control). It does not explicitly cover design/ideal stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is limited by assumptions (uniform temperature, negligible wall heat absorption, constant air specific heat). Validation is performed by comparing simulation outputs with experimental temperature traces and by calibrating free parameters to minimize residual error."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical–digital linkage uses RabbitMQ AMQP over a local network (Wi‑Fi/Ethernet). The Raspberry Pi publishes sensor data and receives actuator commands through AMQP topics."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted on the Raspberry Pi embedded in the incubator, leveraging its local Wi‑Fi/Ethernet connectivity. The codebase is open‑source and can be deployed on other Linux machines as well."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated in the low‑level driver to keep the device in a safe state; however, detailed cybersecurity or safety standards are not specified in the document."
]
